control-interactions.interaction:
VtbTFnsNLpAMdP1VNuQLdQ_ ArrowUp ArrowDown ArrowRight ArrowLeft
KKV653OZhlDQDslafQTIfQ_Moves the focus to the next cell within the same column or row in the respective directions.
6noU3ACdLTmrOqUk3vic3w_ArrowUp
S8GUEIodcj3W/jHVLRqvzw_If the focus is on the first row, the focus moves to the column header.
cqkDnT6DrxeP8MuZchcLVQ_ArrowDown
HG58fAJpCIM3cYvIAZh74w_If the focus is on a column header, the focus moves to the cell in the first visible row of this column, which depends on the current scroll position.
TgGKHt9URLD8LN4yC1n+TQ_If the focus is on the Select All checkbox, the focus moves to the row selector in the first visible row, which depends on the current scroll position.
SEvztGRMM9SKmOTX9eTyJQ_ArrowLeft
m7kSwHyfwhBQGRcom+hATg_If the focus is on a cell in the first column, the focus moves to the row selector.
YBDdJytn3Y7xOVObwr+JiQ_If the focus is on a column header, the focus moves to the column header to the left.
IYJsauG+tW/+je4xS+yesQ_If the focus is on the column header of the first column, the focus moves to the Select All checkbox.
3DlU1y1qbGk9DLSiOHN6lA_If the focus is on the group header of an expanded group, the group is collapsed.
CGW5Ox+CgvvEu/Ealuv9Wg_ArrowRight
4TfncsGEAT2nYH3uc6VyhA_If the focus is on the column header, the focus moves to the column header to the right.
9cx348weKmNdC/hRZOSV3Q_If the focus is on the row selector, the focus moves to the cell of the first column within the same row.
VjGZolRekQxXJ9RSPPlk/w_If the focus is on the Select All checkbox, the focus moves to the column header of the first column.

G4aGIthms/8UHbJmt9iJHA_ PageUp
fp9M/RNssb4ZXogmhk38RA_If the focus is on cell level, the focus moves to the cell at the very top of the same column. If the focus is already on that level, the focus moves one page up and stays on the same column with the required scrolling.
ZnfqDhz6QVfcYCMwfxzb0Q_If the focus is on the first row, the focus moves to the column header.

z6XvZ+AXVs1g5XRHaNM2YQ_ PageDown
axgYeToMuEM1imVabDEm2Q_If the focus is on cell level, the focus moves to the last visible cell in the same column. If the focus is already on that level, it moves one page down and stays on the same column with the required scrolling.
Du4xDeklOxBlYGO72xY+uA_If the focus is on the column header, the focus moves to the first row.

5IBXUOkh/ZivjU612wPCeA_ Alt + PageUp
Hp7sNXOZDOPQWuZzWQGhXQ_If the focus is on cell level or on a column header, the focus moves five columns to the left (default page size). If there are fewer columns on the left than the current page size, the focus moves to the first column.
j0BUAKpq/3j26Delerej6Q_If the focus is on the first column on cell level, the focus moves to the row selector.
DGXTDy5PfoE+2TWsxv5nmQ_If the focus is on the column header of the first column, the focus moves to Select All.

QdT+QvNhauhXY2bCiSnQXA_ Alt + PageDown
2PTjEkjNxjJwRihewkyJ1Q_If the focus is on cell level, the focus moves five columns to the right (default page size).
e1ePeGqTEkQoxJ69z9UIJA_If the focus is on the column header and there are fewer columns on the right than the current page size, the focus moves to the last column.
7b457wNfrYpnM4l3peBDhQ_If the focus is on the row selector, the focus moves to the first column in the same row.
v1hBZkMDp7nvjae3XGbnhg_If the focus is on Select All, the focus moves to the header of the first column.

dpeo1fBCCJgKygrZ3Wfgmw_ Home Pos1
9r2XinfpBczsGGOQ/UVDQQ_If the focus is on the cell, the focus moves to the first column in the same row.
3YRFY7WwrOnBUHifPE0V4w_If the focus is on the cell in the first column, the focus moves to the row selector.
ps8L/7mwXRK137QBodU8EQ_If the focus is on the column header, the focus moves to the header of the first column.
X7hIEiA7M5UzPbf4+dY1JA_If the focus is on the first column header, the focus moves to Select All.

rIZ0RTVdD6V//qqJWhawGA_ End
n/nTNOFxvt54QN0Xjl83+Q_If the focus is on the cell or column header, the focus moves to the last column.
vCHlXThOPlPElFCKw68fPQ_If the focus is on the row selector, the focus moves to the first column in the same row.
l9Eg2XfDkKtId8KsVaB+Mg_If the focus is on Select All, the focus moves to the header of the first column.

c1jO/HkAA7Fef1NXnRg/9Q_ Ctrl + Home Pos1
wG6ZNsnpMvNjsKmUBlVGUQ_If the focus is on the cell, the focus moves to the column header.
/3an70V6BRePxJqOpEOWig_If the focus is on the row selector, the focus moves to Select All.

Jt9QY78VGL6SxNmeqpupdA_ Ctrl + End
9rAoxyHpQbneuh+XZB0sSg_If the focus is on the cell or column header, the focus moves to the last row in the same column.
kngFNOaNEBWrYEWGgZJOMA_If the focus is on the row selector or Select All, the focus moves to the last row selector.

QY9b43aEz/8EVIIjLHD6Fw_ Enter Spacebar
loz0WIj0zboQwRoVlL0Glg_If the focus is on the cell, the focus moves to the first focusable control in the cell.
eSQN7PalbnG3DfZGahWN0g_If the focus is on the Select All checkbox or a row selector, toggles the checkbox state.
B9sjAtnnH5Sq8q23ex8lhA_If the focus is on the column header, the column header menu is opened.
iQ7iEJKnAvj16tEXUImS7w_If the focus is on the group header, the related group is collapsed or expanded.
p+ktM6caW17zDwiuvaCSzg_Enter
zyvsqKU8/H2jLTgStbtf3A_If the focus is on the group header, the group header menu is opened.
5lNqQT0ahHU5nxFeW2m5Hw_Spacebar
nMwX27l1ULQjHJ1jX8+fcQ_If cell selection is enabled:
+qgL6S4/J39Mvl+553mmAA_If the focus is on a cell, the focused cell is selected.
tC3Hq5l6ntJxDP3U17tXXg_If the focus is on a cell selection block, the selection of the cells is removed.
MCwlNq7r4fMsTKCCMZFe2g_If the focus is on a cell, and the table has a certain configuration of the selection behavior (to select a row, you can either select the row itself or the selection checkbox if it is available), only the focused cell is selected instead of the row.
eeGM7WBM30oVL744NvMdOQ_Shift + Spacebar
WysgEiDVMeixdzCG3gggUg_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, this toggles the selection of the current row.
5Yg0lym1xji40Q9e2RhHsQ_If cell selection is enabled:
a/t2mc8GWjg7BQrAsHJm9Q_If the focus is on a cell selection block, the cell selection block is changed into a row selection. The cell selection is removed.
WpNDOGy50rkDyIFcMixWNQ_Depending on the row selection mode the following happens:
D188qCsQjICSU2lcIsmSkg_All rows of the block are selected (multiple selection)
0ytdnvRXxlq6BhbXxy7oXQ_Only the row with the currently focused cell is selected (single selection)
+UkXcDyvdNUJX7FxekzuTA_None of the rows are selected

O0rnZMU4YB77D0x4ehN7SA_ Escape
eUhWvY0uSEOWQROvdhGHyw_If cell selection is enabled:
RF2V47A04VcCEdAue9tuBQ_If the focus is inside of the table, and cells are selected, the selection of the cells is removed.

msVWWj1k5ckWAi6+Wxchyg_ F2
TLuMNTIZlx//8ovD2ThVdg_Toggles the focus between the cell and its content (with the exception of read-only text).

JTV3du0KHJn5ZdJUyTruYg_ Shift + Spacebar
5If3mFostq9mKWNMrjCj6w_If the focus is on Select All, and Spacebar is pressed, the corresponding event is not triggered. Shift prevents this activity.

jiD2cFQgJs45rLLR0abkqQ_ Shift + Spacebar Shift + Enter
bsFAqCDLNarX5WsAgoi26A_If the focus is on a column header, and Spacebar or Enter is pressed, the corresponding event is not triggered.

mDTo36sWBB0SZW7TwqQodA_ Shift + ArrowUp
e+36XWDVNrQDHwfCsBTf1g_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, and the relevant row is selected, the focus moves to the row above, and the selection is enhanced up to this row.
A+zveXWGAWHFaG3FpxeMIQ_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, and the relevant row is not selected, the focus moves to the row above, and the selection is removed for this row.
5oU16KARKUt3HGkehAYcSA_If cell selection is enabled:
gLQlsvkmGT/hYmVK/AkB9g_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, and the row is not selected, the focused cell and the cell above are selected. The focus moves to the cell above the focused cell.
FZEsFxFWiVdmejUCXsF4/A_If the focus is on a selected cell, the cell above gets the focus, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

AVHbApk8GEdwHwrtPavegg_ Shift + ArrowDown
EIYNegagbCQZNMlX45PDDQ_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, and the relevant row is selected, the focus moves to the row below, and the selection is enhanced up to this row.
iFwwRiYXbHwW1TKQAVNQug_If the focus is on a cell or the row selector, and the relevant row is not selected, the focus moves to the row below, and the selection is removed for this row.
I95Kbur1XAjhY2C9EIUclg_If cell selection is enabled:
QkFzWXFSLH2skNvmY/TwQw_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, and the row is not selected, the focused cell and the cell below are selected. The focus moves to the cell below the focused cell.
UdEu4lvFjFQFlL6qt/MkLw_If the focus is on a selected cell, the cell below gets the focus, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

h+jAtBbOZmCja2/9QSNGTA_ Shift + ArrowRight
1Jri2XEFXJpU1viE3VfinA_If the focus is on a column header, the width of this column is increased by 1 em. This is repeated if key remains pressed.
RljL95mBAoAnfDSIFecJDg_If cell selection is enabled:
ZEPPlxOq38u2E/bhI/38Kw_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, the focused cell and the cell to the right are selected. The focus moves to the cell to the right of the focused cell.
bAgJf1f2Z+GXW9BcPzvNig_If the focus is on a selected cell, the cell to the right gets the focus, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

kCfcES1QG56dCChtOcSYww_ Shift + ArrowLeft
JWObxVnVIR7cIr+8D7U8rg_If the focus is on a column header, the width of this column is decreased by 1 em. This is repeated if key remains pressed.
E15GMRLxbtDP5WE7lwFTqQ_If cell selection is enabled:
LCBAdKwZ/JE0RFx1cMw9/Q_If the focus is on a cell that is not selected, the focused cell and the cell to the left are selected. The focus moves to the cell to the left of the focused cell.
jjdM91DhPV99soTb2jlm2g_If the focus is on a selected cell, the cell to the left gets the focus, and the cell selection is enhanced up to this cell.

42Y4Pf0UfK4n9wZ2vpAdTA_ Ctrl + ArrowRight
iD+TVAoOzJzW+nYKZ+jyPA_If the focus is on a column header, the relevant column moves one position to the right.

5IN1sXXHmeRcnTeMjsdDjg_ Ctrl + ArrowLeft
xkaKm9+yWbcutNiOkqwG6w_If the focus is on a column header, the relevant column moves one position to the left.

MVqW1spaTQ6RD5T16Tx27g_ Ctrl + ArrowUp
2P6jBTemb4z+aNr1fY1bfQ_Moves the focus to the next focusable element in the row above.

/qu95d3YW8ZPKg6smLvasQ_ Ctrl + ArrowDown
BEC/9PTQGaQr5wfENzEMmQ_Moves the focus to the next focusable element in the row below.

OyzfJBqHVNH1oMRxOc/ibA_ Ctrl + A
P/I3u/8Ogi5Mk2qwwXKbjw_If the focus is on a cell, the row selector, or Select All, this toggles the Select All checkbox: All rows get selected or deselected respectively.

C2oNwE5zHdRQFHBTusNedQ_ Ctrl + Shift + A
BYx9dKTyJsy5WQcgjrhhxQ_If cell selection is enabled:
usYVCkQn2hdkbOX38IbKaQ_If the focus is inside of the table, the selection for any rows and cells is removed.

yGXYL4gHXj7MvNrDRA4qoQ_ Alt + ArrowUp Alt + ArrowDown F4
fWAsH93S3/KebWNKBzvGBw_If the focus is on a cell, the focus moves to its content (with the exception of a read-only text).
E4z+CAZWpitXE0fbtLO0tg_If the focus is on the group header or a non-leaf node of a tree, this toggles the expansion of the group: The group is expanded or collapsed respectively.

T8MT5sFcki1OAoJq+qnrtg_ Shift + F10
RMrhYo+vrJo2+THzByRddw_If the focus is on the group header, the group header menu is opened.
lQYUjjtlJr6ePqI4s+VJkA_If the focus is on the column header, the column header menu is opened.

3PUzTMdr/cjAeAHQn/jDLQ_ Shift + MouseClick
xkK0WgyyaRB6EJaM6N6YNQ_If cell selection is enabled:
9JYU+XfXV6TxzLERtR1bIg_If cells are selected, Shift + MouseClick on a different cell enhances the selection up to the clicked cell.

h+x5fJOxJg1fL+WC1ZpGSg_ Ctrl + C
VPjEFffEhMazmLqWVa3DqQ_Copies the selected rows or cells to the clipboard if available, and the feature is enabled.

p92qU0KZf7nqLIjb6yHRaw_ Ctrl + V
25pyv8zBR2fibUq4H3uwpQ_Pastes the content from the clipboard if the feature is enabled.
